subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is, verily, the One through Whom the eye of Muhammad was solaced [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لهو الذی به قرت عین محمد
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude
